title: Salomon X Ultra 4 GTX
bullets: Day-hike workhorse — broke in instantly
Quicklace = no double-knots
Grippy on wet granite

title: Osprey Talon 22
bullets: Best-fitting daypack I own
Hip belt pockets actually fit a phone
Bungee for layers I keep peeling off

title: Leki Cross Trail FX Carbon
bullets: Folding, fits in the pack on flats
Saved my knees on the descent at Half Dome
Cork grips don't get slimy

title: Darn Tough Hiker Micro Crew
bullets: Lifetime warranty, not an exaggeration
I own seven pairs in identical color
Merino — no smell after 3 days

title: Garmin inReach Mini 2
bullets: Two-way satellite messaging when there's no service
SOS button I hope I never press
Mom approved

title: Patagonia Down Sweater
bullets: The exact jacket from the Yosemite tunnel view post
800-fill recycled down, packs into its own pocket
Wind-resistant; great as a midlayer under a shell

title: Hydro Flask 32oz Wide Mouth
bullets: Holds ice for ~24h in summer heat
Flex Cap doesn't leak in the pack
Mine has dents and scratches and still going
